canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>tesseract</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #0a0a0f; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// 4D hypercube vertices: all combinations of ±1 in 4 dimensions
const vertices4D = [];
for (let i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
  vertices4D.push([
    (i & 1) ? 1 : -1,
    (i & 2) ? 1 : -1,
    (i & 4) ? 1 : -1,
    (i & 8) ? 1 : -1
  ]);
}

// Edges: connect vertices that differ in exactly one coordinate
const edges = [];
for (let i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
  for (let j = i + 1; j < 16; j++) {
    let diff = 0;
    for (let k = 0; k < 4; k++) {
      if (vertices4D[i][k] !== vertices4D[j][k]) diff++;
    }
    if (diff === 1) edges.push([i, j]);
  }
}

// Mouse state
let mouseX = W / 2;
let mouseY = H / 2;
let rotationBoost = 0;

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
  rotationBoost = 3;
});

// 4D rotation matrices
function rotate4D(v, angles) {
  let [x, y, z, w] = v;
  
  // XY rotation
  let c = Math.cos(angles.xy), s = Math.sin(angles.xy);
  [x, y] = [x * c - y * s, x * s + y * c];
  
  // XZ rotation
  c = Math.cos(angles.xz); s = Math.sin(angles.xz);
  [x, z] = [x * c - z * s, x * s + z * c];
  
  // XW rotation (the 4D one!)
  c = Math.cos(angles.xw); s = Math.sin(angles.xw);
  [x, w] = [x * c - w * s, x * s + w * c];
  
  // YZ rotation
  c = Math.cos(angles.yz); s = Math.sin(angles.yz);
  [y, z] = [y * c - z * s, y * s + z * c];
  
  // YW rotation
  c = Math.cos(angles.yw); s = Math.sin(angles.yw);
  [y, w] = [y * c - w * s, y * s + w * c];
  
  // ZW rotation
  c = Math.cos(angles.zw); s = Math.sin(angles.zw);
  [z, w] = [z * c - w * s, z * s + w * c];
  
  return [x, y, z, w];
}

// Project 4D to 3D (stereographic-ish)
function project4Dto3D(v, distance4D = 2.5) {
  const [x, y, z, w] = v;
  const scale = distance4D / (distance4D - w);
  return [x * scale, y * scale, z * scale, scale];
}

// Project 3D to 2D
function project3Dto2D(v, distance3D = 4) {
  const [x, y, z] = v;
  const scale = distance3D / (distance3D - z);
  return [x * scale, y * scale, scale];
}

// Web Audio for dimensional hum
let audioCtx, oscillators = [], gainNode;
let audioInitialized = false;

function initAudio() {
  if (audioInitialized) return;
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
  gainNode.gain.value = 0.08;
  gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  // Create harmonic oscillators for dimensional drone
  const freqs = [55, 82.5, 110, 165]; // A1 and harmonics
  freqs.forEach((freq, i) => {
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const oscGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.type = 'sine';
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    oscGain.gain.value = 0.3 / (i + 1);
    osc.connect(oscGain);
    oscGain.connect(gainNode);
    osc.start();
    oscillators.push({ osc, gain: oscGain, baseFreq: freq });
  });
  audioInitialized = true;
}

canvas.addEventListener('click', initAudio, { once: true });
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', initAudio, { once: true });

// Trail history for ghosting effect
const trailHistory = [];
const maxTrails = 8;

// Animation state
let time = 0;

function animate() {
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  
  // Decay rotation boost
  rotationBoost *= 0.95;
  
  // Mouse influence on rotation speeds
  const mx = (mouseX - W / 2) / W;
  const my = (mouseY - H / 2) / H;
  
  const baseSpeed = 0.003 + rotationBoost * 0.02;
  
  // Rotation angles - different speeds for that 4D tumbling feel
  const angles = {
    xy: time * baseSpeed * 1.0 + mx * 0.5,
    xz: time * baseSpeed * 0.7 + my * 0.3,
    xw: time * baseSpeed * 0.5,  // The key 4D rotation
    yz: time * baseSpeed * 0.3,
    yw: time * baseSpeed * 0.4 + mx * 0.2,
    zw: time * baseSpeed * 0.6 + my * 0.2
  };
  
  // Transform all vertices
  const projected = vertices4D.map(v => {
    const rotated = rotate4D(v, angles);
    const [x3, y3, z3, scale4] = project4Dto3D(rotated);
    const [x2, y2, scale3] = project3Dto2D([x3, y3, z3]);
    return {
      x: W / 2 + x2 * Math.min(W, H) * 0.18,
      y: H / 2 + y2 * Math.min(W, H) * 0.18,
      depth: z3,
      scale: scale4 * scale3
    };
  });
  
  // Store for trails
  trailHistory.unshift(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(projected)));
  if (trailHistory.length > maxTrails) trailHistory.pop();
  
  // Clear with slight fade for motion blur
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Draw trails
  trailHistory.forEach((frame, frameIdx) => {
    if (frameIdx === 0) return; // Skip current frame for trails
    const alpha = (1 - frameIdx / maxTrails) * 0.15;
    
    edges.forEach(([i, j]) => {
      const p1 = frame[i];
      const p2 = frame[j];
      
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);
      ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(180, 80, 200, ${alpha})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.stroke();
    });
  });
  
  // Sort edges by average depth for proper layering
  const sortedEdges = edges.map(([i, j]) => ({
    i, j,
    avgDepth: (projected[i].depth + projected[j].depth) / 2
  })).sort((a, b) => a.avgDepth - b.avgDepth);
  
  // Draw edges
  sortedEdges.forEach(({ i, j, avgDepth }) => {
    const p1 = projected[i];
    const p2 = projected[j];
    
    // Depth-based coloring: deeper = more cyan, closer = more pink
    const t = (avgDepth + 2) / 4; // Normalize -2 to 2 → 0 to 1
    const r = Math.floor(80 + 175 * t);
    const g = Math.floor(200 - 120 * t);
    const b = Math.floor(220 - 20 * t);
    
    const avgScale = (p1.scale + p2.scale) / 2;
    const lineWidth = 1 + avgScale * 1.5;
    const alpha = 0.4 + avgScale * 0.4;
    
    // Glow layer
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha * 0.3})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = lineWidth * 3;
    ctx.lineCap = 'round';
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Main edge
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = lineWidth;
    ctx.stroke();
  });
  
  // Draw vertices
  const sortedVertices = projected.map((p, i) => ({ ...p, i }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.depth - b.depth);
  
  sortedVertices.forEach(p => {
    const t = (p.depth + 2) / 4;
    const r = Math.floor(100 + 155 * t);
    const g = Math.floor(180 - 100 * t);
    const b = Math.floor(230 - 30 * t);
    
    const size = 2 + p.scale * 4;
    
    // Outer glow
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(p.x, p.y, 0, p.x, p.y, size * 3);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, 0.6)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, 0.2)`);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, size * 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Core
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, 0.9)`;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Hot center
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, size * 0.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)';
    ctx.fill();
  });
  
  // Update audio based on rotation state
  if (audioInitialized && oscillators.length > 0) {
    // Modulate frequencies based on 4D rotation
    const wFactor = Math.sin(angles.xw) * 0.1 + Math.sin(angles.yw) * 0.05;
    oscillators.forEach((o, i) => {
      const targetFreq = o.baseFreq * (1 + wFactor * (i + 1) * 0.5);
      o.osc.frequency.setTargetAtTime(targetFreq, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
    });
    
    // Volume based on rotation boost
    const targetGain = 0.06 + rotationBoost * 0.1;
    gainNode.gain.setTargetAtTime(targetGain, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
  }
  
  time++;
}

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
